title: Current Data Pages
text:
This page is under development. More information will be listed soon! To find a list of public datasets and publications, please see the “Published Reports and Datasets” tab above.



















Marine heatwave monitoring of the Northeast Pacific Ocean


Satellite SST maps, anomalies, and buoy time series of the Northeast Pacific for tracking marine heatwaves.












Line P dissolved oxygen monitoring


Dissolved oxygen plots from stations of the Line P long-term monitoring program.












BC lightstation sea-surface temperature


Observational data, trends and climatologies of ocean temperature measured at B.C. Lightstations. Daily observations extend as far back as 1914.












Ocean Sciences Division mooring data


Time series of temperature and salinity from mooring stations on the west coast of British Columbia.












Deep water properties of B.C. inlets


Deep water properties, physical descriptions, and monitoring data for major inlets of British Columbia from the Water Properties database, CIOOS Pacific and the Hakai Institute. Summaries include monthly and annual statistics and time series of samples back to the 1930’s.





No matching items

title: Published Reports and Datasets
text:
Publications

New!📣A sea surface temperature product for monitoring Marine Heatwaves in the Northeast Pacific. A. Hilborn, L. Guan, D. Wan and A. Peña, 2025. Canadian Technical Report of Hydrography and Ocean Sciences. 394: v + 23 p.
New tools for ADCP processing. H. Hourston, D. Wan and L. Guan, 2021. Canadian Technical Report of Hydrography and Ocean Sciences. 336: vi + 36 p.



Code

ios-shell, a python package to parse “IOS Shell” format files found in the Water Properties database



Datasets
A few of the layers we have published are listed below. Some of the datasets listed here can also be found in the following online locations:

Canada Marine Planning Atlas
Salish Sea Initiative


Climatologies

Satellite Chlorophyll-a Concentration:

Chlorophyll-a Concentration Monthly Climatology of the Pacific Exclusive Economic Zone, 2003-2020 (1 km and 4km spatial resolution, MODIS-Aqua)



Satellite Sea Surface Temperature:

Sea Surface Temperature Monthly Climatology of the Pacific Exclusive Economic Zone, 2003-2020 (1 km, MODIS-Aqua)
Sea Surface Temperature Monthly Climatology of the Pacific Exclusive Economic Zone, 1981-2010 (4 km, AVHRR)
Sea Surface Temperature Monthly Climatology of the Pacific Exclusive Economic Zone, 1990-2020 (4 km, AVHRR)



Temperature, Salinity and Sigma-t

Seasonal Climatologies of the Northeast Pacific Ocean (1980-2010)
Seasonal Climatologies of the Canadian Pacific Exclusive Economic Zone (1980-2010)




Long-term Monitoring Data

British Columbia Lightstation Sea-Surface Temperature and Salinity Data (Pacific) 1914-present
